title: Home
story: Land here on ./start.sh. Cards: current project, rulebook size, # substrates, last build time, last test pass-rate, which spokes are active, who you're signed in as.

title: Entities
story: Left: list of every entity in the active project's rulebook. Right: selected entity's fields, formulas, sample rows. Developer can add/rename/delete fields inline; viewer sees the same with controls disabled.

title: Formulas
story: Every calculated field across all entities. Drill in to see live DAG visualization (inputs → intermediates → output) sourced from the rulebook's explain-dag substrate. Developer can edit Excel-style formula in place; portal auto-validates against the parser.

title: Relationships
story: FK graph (interactive). Hover a node to highlight its inbound/outbound edges. Click an edge to see which formula or column declares it.

title: Sample Data
story: Spreadsheet-style view of the data block of each entity. Developer can edit cells; computed columns are read-only and show the resolved value with a hoverable derivation popover.

title: Substrates
story: Left: every substrate this project emits (with last-build timestamp + conformance status). Right: file tree of generated output + a preview pane for any file. Developer can trigger 'Rebuild just this substrate'.

title: Add Tool
story: Browse the 15+ transpilers in the catalog. Click one, choose output path, hit Install. Portal shells out to `effortless -install <proxy-url>` so the result is byte-identical to the CLI path. Tool then shows up in /substrates and is ready for the next build.

title: Builds
story: Chronological list of builds. Click one to see which transpilers ran, duration each, stdout/stderr per route, and which files changed. Trigger-build button is gated by CanRunBuilds.

title: Tests
story: Matrix: rows = test cases, columns = substrates, cells = pass/fail. Click a failing cell to see input, expected, actual, and a diff. Trigger-tests button is gated by CanRunBuilds.

title: Input Spokes
story: List of every configured input spoke for this project. Status (last-pulled time, last-error). Developer can trigger a pull from any spoke.

title: Users
story: Default dev/test users from the rulebook + roles. Developer can add new users (saved through the write-through invariant, so they end up in rulebook JSON).

title: Postgres Explorer
story: Raw SQL console + table browser for the editor Postgres DB. Developer-only escape hatch. Background banner reminds: rulebook JSON is the SSoT, this DB is rebuildable.

title: ssotme-proxy
story: Live status of localhost:4242: registered routes, recent calls (route, duration, status, response size), last error per route. Restart button.

title: Project Files
story: Browse the active project folder. View any file. Read-only — prevents drift from rulebook.

title: Raw Rulebook JSON
story: Monaco editor on the raw effortless-rulebook.json. Save goes through the write-through invariant. Useful for bulk edits.

title: Reset Editor
story: One-button reset: drops the editor Postgres DB and re-bootstraps from rulebook JSON. The reassurance screen — makes the JSON-as-SSoT promise tangible.
